Uses of Class
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.concept.ReservoirInput

Packages that use ReservoirInput
Package
Description
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.concept
Field concept definition classes for rapid field development screening.
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.economics
Economics package for field development analysis.
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.evaluation
Concept evaluation and batch processing for field development.
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.screening
Screening tools for flow assurance, safety, emissions, and economics.
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.tieback
Tie-back analysis package for field development screening.

    Method

    TiebackAnalyzer.createRepresentativeWellheadStream(ReservoirInput reservoir, double pressureBara, double temperatureC, boolean isGasField, double totalRate, String rateUnit)
    Creates a representative wellhead stream for hydraulic screening.

    TiebackAnalyzer.estimateProducedWaterRate(ReservoirInput reservoir, double oilRateBopd)
    Estimates produced-water rate from water cut and oil rate.

    TiebackAnalyzer.screenFlowAssurance(TiebackOption option, FieldConcept discovery, HostFacility host, ReservoirInput reservoir, WellsInput wells, boolean isGasField, double totalRate, String rateUnit, TiebackRouteNetwork routeNetwork)
    Screens the tieback route using pipeline hydraulics and thermodynamic flow-assurance checks.
